category_sources: Official Honcho docs describe a command-line application for managing and running Procfile-based applications.
source_facts.description says Python clone of Foreman for managing Procfile-based applications.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title and GitHub README use Honcho.
docs_sources: Official Read the Docs site is linked from the official GitHub README and contains the documentation index.
Using Procfiles page documents the core Procfile behavior.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is nickstenning/honcho and README links to Honcho documentation.
Official Honcho docs say it can be downloaded from GitHub.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says Honcho is a Python port of Foreman for Procfile-based applications.
Official docs describe running multiple external processes and multiplexing output.
